description:
This quiz tests and deepens knowledge of JavaScript's native Date API, which has a notoriously difficult interface. It targets developers who often rely on third-party libraries for date formatting and localization, encouraging them to understand the built-in capabilities. The tone is humorous and critical, with a moderate to advanced difficulty level.
Topics: JavaScript Date class, native Date API, date formatting, localization
Audience: JavaScript developers who may overuse third-party date libraries
